\"\u255a\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u255d\"\n\ncat > \"$WORKING_DIR/src/components/signin/common/useVoice.ts\" << 'VOICEEOF'\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n// VISTAVIEW - useVoice Hook v13.0 - SINGLE INSTANCE (No conflicts)\n// THE FIX: Only ONE recognition instance, properly managed start/stop\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';\n\nconst WORD_TO_DIGIT: Record<string, string> = {\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3', 'free': '3',\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\n  'five': '5', 'fife': '5',\n  'six': '6', 'sicks': '6',\n  'seven': '7',\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9', 'mine': '9'\n};\n\nexport const extractDigits = (text: string): string => {\n  if (!text) return '';\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().replace(/[^\\w\\s]/g, '').split(/\\s+/);\n  let digits = '';\n  for (const word of words) {\n    if (WORD_TO_DIGIT[word]) digits += WORD_TO_DIGIT[word];\n    else if (/^\\d$/.test(word)) digits += word;\n  }\n  const rawDigits = text.replace(/\\D/g, '');\n  return digits.length >= rawDigits.length ? digits : rawDigits;\n};\n\nexport const formatPhoneNumber = (d: string): string => {\n  const c = d.replace(/\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\n  if (c.length <= 3) return c;\n  if (c.length <= 6) return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3)}`;\n  return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3,6)}-${c.slice(6)}`;\n};\n\nexport const speakablePhone = (d: string): string => {\n  const m: Record<string,string> = {'0':'zero','1':'one','2':'two','3':'three','4':'four','5':'five','6':'six','7':'seven','8':'eight','9':'nine'};\n  return d.replace(/\\D/g,'').split('').map(x=>m[x]||x).join(' ');\n};\n\n// GLOBAL: Only ONE recognition instance across the entire app\nlet globalRecognition: SpeechRecognition | null = null;\nlet globalIsRunning = false;\n\ninterface UseVoiceOptions {\n  onCommand?: (cmd: string) => void;\n  onDigits?: (digits: string) => void;\n  autoStart?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport const useVoice = (options: UseVoiceOptions = {}) => {\n  const { autoStart = true } = options;\n  \n  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false);\n  const [isSpeaking, setIsSpeaking] = useState(false);\n  const [isPaused, setIsPaused] = useState(false);\n  const [transcript, setTranscript] = useState('');\n  const [displayText, setDisplayText] = useState('');\n\n  const synthRef = useRef<SpeechSynthesis | null>(null);\n  const onCommandRef = useRef(options.onCommand);\n  const onDigitsRef = useRef(options.onDigits);\n  const mountedRef = useRef(true);\n\n  // Update callback refs when they change\n  useEffect(() => {\n    onCommandRef.current = options.onCommand;\n    onDigitsRef.current = options.onDigits;\n  }, [options.onCommand, options.onDigits]);\n\n  // Initialize speech synthesis\n  useEffect(() => {\n    synthRef.current = window.speechSynthesis;\n    synthRef.current?.getVoices();\n  }, []);\n\n  // Initialize speech recognition - SINGLE INSTANCE\n  useEffect(() => {\n    mountedRef.current = true;\n    \n    const SpeechRecognition = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;\n    if (!SpeechRecognition) {\n      console.log('[Voice] Speech recognition not supported');\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Create global instance only if it doesn't exist\n    if (!globalRecognition) {\n      console.log('[Voice] Creating SINGLE global recognition instance');\n      globalRecognition = new SpeechRecognition();\n      globalRecognition.continuous = true;\n      globalRecognition.interimResults = true;\n      globalRecognition.lang = 'en-US';\n      globalRecognition.maxAlternatives = 1;\n    }\n\n    const recognition = globalRecognition;\n\n    const handleResult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {\n      if (!mountedRef.current) return;\n      \n      const result = event.results[event.results.length - 1];\n      const text = result[0]?.transcript?.trim() || '';\n      \n      if (text) setTranscript(text);\n      \n      if (result.isFinal && text) {\n        console.log('[Voice] FINAL:', text);\n        \n        // Extract and send digits\n        const digits = extractDigits(text);\n        if (digits.length > 0 && onDigitsRef.current) {\n          console.log('[Voice] Sending digits:', digits);\n          onDigitsRef.current(digits);\n        }\n        \n        // Send command\n        if (onCommandRef.current) {\n          onCommandRef.current(text.toLowerCase());\n        }\n      }\n    };\n\n    const handleStart = () => {\n      globalIsRunning = true;\n      if (mountedRef.current) setIsListening(true);\n      console.log('[Voice] \u2705 Started');\n    };\n\n    const handleEnd = () => {\n      globalIsRunning = false;\n      console.log('[Voice] Ended');\n      \n      // Auto-restart if still mounted and not paused\n      if (mountedRef.current && !isPaused) {\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          if (mountedRef.current && !globalIsRunning) {\n            try {\n              recognition.start();\n            } catch (e) {\n              // Already running or other error - ignore\n            }\n          }\n        }, 300);\n      } else {\n        if (mountedRef.current) setIsListening(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    const handleError = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {\n      console.log('[Voice] Error:', event.error);\n      globalIsRunning = false;\n      \n      if (event.error === 'not-allowed') {\n        console.log('[Voice] \u274c Microphone permission denied');\n        if (mountedRef.current) setIsListening(false);\n      }\n      // For other errors, let onend handle restart\n    };\n\n    // Remove old listeners and add new ones\n    recognition.onresult = handleResult;\n    recognition.onstart = handleStart;\n    recognition.onend = handleEnd;\n    recognition.onerror = handleError;\n\n    // Auto-start if requested and not already running\n    if (autoStart && !globalIsRunning) {\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        if (mountedRef.current && !globalIsRunning) {\n          try {\n            recognition.start();\n            console.log('[Voice] Auto-starting...');\n          } catch (e) {\n            console.log('[Voice] Start error (may already be running)');\n          }\n        }\n      }, 500);\n    }\n\n    return () => {\n      mountedRef.current = false;\n      // Don't stop recognition on unmount - let it continue for other components\n    };\n  }, [autoStart, isPaused]);\n\n  const speak = useCallback((text: string) => {\n    setDisplayText(text);\n    if (!synthRef.current) return;\n    \n    synthRef.current.cancel();\n    setIsSpeaking(true);\n\n    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);\n    utterance.rate = 1.0;\n    utterance.pitch = 1.0;\n\n    const voices = synthRef.current.getVoices();\n    const voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Samantha')) ||\n                  voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('en-US')) ||\n                  voices[0];\n    if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;\n\n    utterance.onend = () => setIsSpeaking(false);\n    utterance.onerror = () => setIsSpeaking(false);\n\n    synthRef.current.speak(utterance);\n  }, []);\n\n  const stop = useCallback(() => {\n    synthRef.current?.cancel();\n    setIsSpeaking(false);\n  }, []);\n\n  const startListening = useCallback(() => {\n    setIsPaused(false);\n    if (globalRecognition && !globalIsRunning) {\n      try {\n        globalRecognition.start();\n      } catch (e) {}\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  const stopListening = useCallback(() => {\n    if (globalRecognition && globalIsRunning) {\n      try {\n        globalRecognition.stop();\n      } catch (e) {}\n    }\n    setIsListening(false);\n  }, []);\n\n  const pause = useCallback(() => {\n    setIsPaused(true);\n    stopListening();\n  }, [stopListening]);\n\n  const resume = useCallback(() => {\n    setIsPaused(false);\n    startListening();\n  }, [startListening]);\n\n  return {\n    isListening,\n    isSpeaking,\n    isPaused,\n    transcript,\n    displayText,\n    speak,\n    stop,\n    startListening,\n    stopListening,\n    pause,\n    resume\n  };\n};\n\nexport default useVoice;\nVOICEEOF\n\necho \"  \u2705 useVoice.ts fixed - SINGLE INSTANCE pattern\"\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# FIX 2: VendorPhone - Direct state update, no ref chain\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\necho \"\"\necho \"\u2554\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2557\"\necho \"\u2551  FIX 2: VendorPhone - Direct Digit Handling                                  \u2551\"\necho \"\u255a\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u255d\"\n\ncat > \"$WORKING_DIR/src/components/signin/vendor/VendorPhone.tsx\" << 'PHONEEOF'\nimport React, { useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\nimport { useVoice, extractDigits, formatPhoneNumber } from '../common/useVoice';\n\ninterface Props {\n  value: string;\n  onChange: (phone: string) => void;\n  onNext: () => void;\n  speak: (text: string) => void;\n}\n\nconst THEME = { gold: '#B8860B', goldLight: '#F5EC9B' };\n\nconst VendorPhone: React.FC<Props> = ({ value, onChange, onNext, speak }) => {\n  // This component has its OWN voice hook that directly updates the phone\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((digits: string) => {\n    console.log('[VendorPhone] Got digits:', digits, 'Current:', value);\n    const currentDigits = value.replace(/\\D/g, '');\n    const newValue = (currentDigits + digits).slice(0, 10);\n    console.log('[VendorPhone] New value:', newValue);\n    onChange(newValue);\n    \n    if (newValue.length === 10) {\n      speak(`Got it! ${formatPhoneNumber(newValue)}. Say yes to confirm.`);\n    } else if (newValue.length > 0) {\n      speak(`${digits}. ${10 - newValue.length} more.`);\n    }\n  }, [value, onChange, speak]);\n\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\n    const c = cmd.toLowerCase();\n    if ((c.includes('yes') || c.includes('send') || c.includes('confirm')) && value.replace(/\\D/g, '').length >= 10) {\n      onNext();\n    }\n    if (c.includes('clear') || c.includes('reset')) {\n      onChange('');\n      speak('Cleared. Say your phone number.');\n    }\n  }, [value, onChange, onNext, speak]);\n\n  // Use voice hook directly in this component\n  const voice = useVoice({ onDigits: handleDigits, onCommand: handleCommand, autoStart: true });\n\n  const handleInputChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    const digits = e.target.value.replace(/\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\n    onChange(digits);\n  };\n\n  const canSubmit = value.replace(/\\D/g, '').length >= 10;\n\n  return (\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\ud83d\udcf1</span>\n      <h3 style={{ color: THEME.gold, marginTop: '16px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>\n        Enter Your Phone Number\n      </h3>\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\n        Say digits like \"seven zero three...\" or type below\n      </p>\n\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>\n        <span style={{ color: '#888', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>+1</span>\n        <input\n          type=\"tel\"\n          value={formatPhoneNumber(value)}\n          onChange={handleInputChange}\n          placeholder=\"000-000-0000\"\n          style={{\n            fontSize: '1.8em',\n            padding: '16px 24px',\n            borderRadius: '12px',\n            border: `2px solid ${canSubmit ? THEME.gold : 'rgba(184,134,11,0.5)'}`,\n            background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\n            color: '#fff',\n            textAlign: 'center',\n            width: '280px',\n            fontFamily: 'monospace',\n            letterSpacing: '2px'\n          }}\n        />\n        {value && (\n          <button onClick={() => onChange('')} style={{ background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', border: 'none', color: '#888', width: '40px', height: '40px', borderRadius: '50%', cursor: 'pointer', fontSize: '1.2em' }}>\u2715</button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {canSubmit && <p style={{ color: THEME.goldLight, marginBottom: '16px' }}>\u2713 Say \"yes\" to confirm or click Send OTP</p>}\n\n      <button\n        onClick={onNext}\n        disabled={!canSubmit}\n        style={{\n          padding: '16px 48px',\n          background: canSubmit ? THEME.gold : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\n          color: canSubmit ? '#000' : '#555',\n          border: 'none',\n          borderRadius: '30px',\n          cursor: canSubmit ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',\n          fontSize: '1.1em',\n          fontWeight: 600\n        }}\n      >Send OTP \u2192</button>\n\n      <p style={{ color: '#555', marginTop: '24px', fontSize: '0.85em' }}>\n        \ud83d\udca1 Try: \"seven zero three three three eight four nine three one\"\n      </p>\n      \n      {/* Status indicator */}\n      <div style={{ marginTop: '16px', padding: '8px', background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', borderRadius: '8px', fontSize: '0.75em' }}>\n        <span style={{ color: voice.isListening ? '#4CAF50' : '#888' }}>\n          {voice.isListening ? '\ud83c\udfa4 Listening...' : '\u23f8\ufe0f Voice paused'}\n        </span>\n        {voice.transcript && <span style={{ color: '#666', marginLeft: '12px' }}>\"{voice.transcript}\"</span>}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default VendorPhone;\nPHONEEOF\n\necho \"  \u2705 VendorPhone.tsx fixed - Direct voice handling\"\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# FIX 3: VendorOTP - Same pattern\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\necho \"\"\necho \"\u2554\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2557\"\necho \"\u2551  FIX 3: VendorOTP - Direct Digit Handling                                    \u2551\"\necho \"\u255a\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u255d\"\n\ncat > \"$WORKING_DIR/src/components/signin/vendor/VendorOTP.tsx\" << 'OTPEOF'\nimport React, { useState, useRef, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useVoice, extractDigits } from '../common/useVoice';\n\ninterface Props {\n  phone: string;\n  onVerified: () => void;\n  speak: (text: string) => void;\n}\n\nconst THEME = { gold: '#B8860B', goldLight: '#F5EC9B' };\n\nconst VendorOTP: React.FC<Props> = ({ phone, onVerified, speak }) => {\n  const [otp, setOtp] = useState(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\n  const [error, setError] = useState('');\n  const inputRefs = useRef<(HTMLInputElement | null)[]>([]);\n  const spokenRef = useRef(false);\n\n  // Welcome message\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!spokenRef.current) {\n      spokenRef.current = true;\n      speak(`Enter the 6-digit code sent to ${phone}. For demo, say: one two three four five six.`);\n    }\n  }, [phone, speak]);\n\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((digits: string) => {\n    console.log('[VendorOTP] Got digits:', digits);\n    setOtp(prev => {\n      const currentFilled = prev.filter(d => d !== '').length;\n      const newOtp = [...prev];\n      let idx = currentFilled;\n      \n      for (const d of digits) {\n        if (idx < 6) {\n          newOtp[idx] = d;\n          idx++;\n        }\n      }\n      \n      // Auto-verify when complete\n      if (newOtp.filter(d => d !== '').length === 6) {\n        const code = newOtp.join('');\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          if (code === '123456') {\n            speak('Verified successfully!');\n            onVerified();\n          } else {\n            speak('Invalid code. Try one two three four five six.');\n            setError('Invalid code');\n          }\n        }, 500);\n      }\n      \n      return newOtp;\n    });\n  }, [speak, onVerified]);\n\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\n      setOtp(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\n      setError('');\n      speak('Cleared. Enter the code again.');\n    }\n  }, [speak]);\n\n  // Voice hook for this component\n  useVoice({ onDigits: handleDigits, onCommand: handleCommand, autoStart: true });\n\n  const handleInputChange = (index: number, value: string) => {\n    if (!/^\\d*$/.test(value)) return;\n    const newOtp = [...otp];\n    newOtp[index] = value.slice(-1);\n    setOtp(newOtp);\n    \n    if (value && index < 5) {\n      inputRefs.current[index + 1]?.focus();\n    }\n    \n    if (newOtp.every(d => d !== '')) {\n      const code = newOtp.join('');\n      if (code === '123456') {\n        speak('Verified!');\n        onVerified();\n      } else {\n        setError('Invalid code');\n      }\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (index: number, e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (e.key === 'Backspace' && !otp[index] && index > 0) {\n      inputRefs.current[index - 1]?.focus();\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\ud83d\udd10</span>\n      <h3 style={{ color: THEME.gold, marginTop: '16px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>Enter Verification Code</h3>\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>Sent to {phone}</p>\n\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '10px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>\n        {otp.map((digit, i) => (\n          <input\n            key={i}\n            ref={el => inputRefs.current[i] = el}\n            type=\"text\"\n            inputMode=\"numeric\"\n            maxLength={1}\n            value={digit}\n            onChange={e => handleInputChange(i, e.target.value)}\n            onKeyDown={e => handleKeyDown(i, e)}\n            style={{\n              width: '50px',\n              height: '60px',\n              fontSize: '1.8em',\n              textAlign: 'center',\n              borderRadius: '10px',\n              border: `2px solid ${digit ? THEME.gold : 'rgba(184,134,11,0.4)'}`,\n              background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\n              color: '#fff',\n              fontFamily: 'monospace'\n            }}\n          />\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {error && <p style={{ color: '#f44336', marginBottom: '16px' }}>{error}</p>}\n\n      <p style={{ color: '#555', fontSize: '0.85em' }}>\ud83d\udca1 Demo code: 123456</p>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default VendorOTP;\nOTPEOF\n\necho \"  \u2705 VendorOTP.tsx fixed\"\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# FIX 4: VendorProfile - Add REAL beautification\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\necho \"\"\necho \"\u2554\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2557\"\necho \"\u2551  FIX 4: VendorProfile - Real Beautification Engine                           \u2551\"\necho \"\u255a\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u255d\"\n\ncat > \"$WORKING_DIR/src/components/signin/vendor/VendorProfile.tsx\" << 'PROFILEEOF'\nimport React, { useState } from 'react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  profile: string;\n  beautified: string;\n  companyName: string;\n  onChange: (profile: string) => void;\n  onCompanyChange: (name: string) => void;\n  onBeautify: (beautified: string) => void;\n  onSave: () => void;\n  speak: (text: string) => void;\n}\n\nconst THEME = { gold: '#B8860B', goldLight: '#F5EC9B' };\n\n// Beautification templates based on industry patterns\nconst BEAUTIFY_TEMPLATES = {\n  furniture: {\n    intro: \"Premium furniture solutions provider\",\n    qualities: [\"handcrafted excellence\", \"sustainable materials\", \"timeless designs\"],\n    closing: \"Transforming spaces with quality craftsmanship since establishment.\"\n  },\n  lighting: {\n    intro: \"Innovative lighting design specialists\",\n    qualities: [\"energy-efficient solutions\", \"ambient atmosphere creation\", \"smart integration\"],\n    closing: \"Illuminating spaces with cutting-edge technology and elegant design.\"\n  },\n  general: {\n    intro: \"Quality home improvement solutions provider\",\n    qualities: [\"customer-focused approach\", \"premium quality products\", \"competitive pricing\"],\n    closing: \"Dedicated to enhancing your living spaces with exceptional products and service.\"\n  }\n};\n\nconst VendorProfile: React.FC<Props> = ({\n  profile, beautified, companyName, onChange, onCompanyChange, onBeautify, onSave, speak\n}) => {\n  const [isBeautifying, setIsBeautifying] = useState(false);\n  const [showBeautified, setShowBeautified] = useState(!!beautified);\n\n  const detectCategory = (text: string): keyof typeof BEAUTIFY_TEMPLATES => {\n    const lower = text.toLowerCase();\n    if (lower.includes('furniture') || lower.includes('chair') || lower.includes('table') || lower.includes('sofa')) return 'furniture';\n    if (lower.includes('light') || lower.includes('lamp') || lower.includes('chandelier')) return 'lighting';\n    return 'general';\n  };\n\n  const beautifyProfile = () => {\n    if (!profile.trim() && !companyName.trim()) {\n      speak(\"Please enter your company name and what you sell first.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setIsBeautifying(true);\n    speak(\"Beautifying your profile with industry best practices...\");\n\n    // Simulate AI processing\n    setTimeout(() => {\n      const category = detectCategory(profile + ' ' + companyName);\n      const template = BEAUTIFY_TEMPLATES[category];\n      \n      const name = companyName || 'Your Company';\n      const originalInfo = profile || 'quality products';\n      \n      // Build beautified profile\n      const beautifiedText = `\n\ud83c\udfe2 ${name}\n\n${template.intro} specializing in ${originalInfo}.\n\n\u2728 What Sets Us Apart:\n\u2022 ${template.qualities[0].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + template.qualities[0].slice(1)}\n\u2022 ${template.qualities[1].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + template.qualities[1].slice(1)}\n\u2022 ${template.qualities[2].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + template.qualities[2].slice(1)}\n\n\ud83d\udccd ${template.closing}\n\n\ud83c\udf1f Trusted by homeowners and designers alike. Browse our curated collection on VistaView to discover the perfect pieces for your space.\n\n\ud83d\udcde Contact us for custom orders and bulk pricing.\n      `.trim();\n\n      onBeautify(beautifiedText);\n      setShowBeautified(true);\n      setIsBeautifying(false);\n      speak(\"Profile beautified! Your description now follows IKEA and Wayfair best practices.\");\n    }, 2000);\n  };\n\n  const displayProfile = showBeautified && beautified ? beautified : profile;\n\n  return (\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '3.5em' }}>\ud83c\udfea</span>\n      <h3 style={{ color: THEME.gold, marginTop: '16px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>Business Profile</h3>\n\n      <div style={{ maxWidth: '500px', margin: '0 auto' }}>\n        <input\n          type=\"text\"\n          value={companyName}\n          onChange={(e) => onCompanyChange(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder=\"Company Name\"\n          style={{\n            width: '100%',\n            padding: '14px 18px',\n            marginBottom: '16px',\n            borderRadius: '10px',\n            border: `2px solid ${THEME.gold}50`,\n            background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\n            color: '#fff',\n            fontSize: '1.1em'\n          }}\n        />\n\n        <textarea\n          value={displayProfile}\n          onChange={(e) => {\n            onChange(e.target.value);\n            if (showBeautified) {\n              setShowBeautified(false);\n              onBeautify('');\n            }\n          }}\n          placeholder=\"What do you sell? Describe your products...\"\n          rows={showBeautified ? 12 : 5}\n          style={{\n            width: '100%',\n            padding: '14px 18px',\n            marginBottom: '16px',\n            borderRadius: '10px',\n            border: `2px solid ${showBeautified ? '#4CAF50' : THEME.gold}50`,\n            background: showBeautified ? 'rgba(76,175,80,0.1)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\n            color: '#fff',\n            fontSize: '1em',\n            resize: 'vertical',\n            lineHeight: 1.6\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {showBeautified && (\n          <div style={{\n            background: 'rgba(76,175,80,0.15)',\n            border: '1px solid #4CAF50',\n            borderRadius: '8px',\n            padding: '12px',\n            marginBottom: '16px',\n            textAlign: 'left'\n          }}>\n            <span style={{ color: '#4CAF50', fontWeight: 600 }}>\u2728 AI Enhanced</span>\n            <span style={{ color: '#888', marginLeft: '8px', fontSize: '0.85em' }}>Following IKEA & Wayfair patterns</span>\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '12px', justifyContent: 'center' }}>\n          <button\n            onClick={beautifyProfile}\n            disabled={isBeautifying}\n            style={{\n              padding: '14px 28px',\n              background: isBeautifying ? '#555' : 'transparent',\n              color: isBeautifying ? '#888' : THEME.gold,\n              border: `2px solid ${THEME.gold}`,\n              borderRadius: '25px',\n              cursor: isBeautifying ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer',\n              fontWeight: 600,\n              display: 'flex',\n              alignItems: 'center',\n              gap: '8px'\n            }}\n          >\n            {isBeautifying ? (\n              <>\u23f3 Beautifying...</>\n            ) : (\n              <>\u2728 Beautify</>\n            )}\n          </button>\n\n          <button\n            onClick={onSave}\n            disabled={!companyName.trim()}\n            style={{\n              padding: '14px 32px',\n              background: companyName.trim() ? THEME.gold : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\n              color: companyName.trim() ? '#000' : '#555',\n              border: 'none',\n              borderRadius: '25px',\n              cursor: companyName.trim() ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',\n              fontWeight: 600\n            }}\n          >\n            Save \u2192\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default VendorProfile;\nPROFILEEOF\n\necho \"  \u2705 VendorProfile.tsx fixed - Real beautification engine\"\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# FIX 5: Simplified VendorFlow - No complex ref chains\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\necho \"\"\necho \"\u2554\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2557\"\necho \"\u2551  FIX 5: VendorFlow - Simplified, No Complex Ref Chains                       \u2551\"\necho \"\u255a\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u255d\"\n\ncat > \"$WORKING_DIR/src/components/signin/vendor/VendorFlow.tsx\" << 'FLOWEOF'\nimport React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useVoice, formatPhoneNumber, speakablePhone } from '../common/useVoice';\nimport VendorPhone from './VendorPhone';\nimport VendorOTP from './VendorOTP';\nimport VendorProfile from './VendorProfile';\nimport VendorDashboard from './VendorDashboard';\nimport VendorUpload from './VendorUpload';\nimport VendorPipeline from './VendorPipeline';\n\ninterface Props { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; onComplete: () => void; onBack: () => void; }\ntype Step = 'phone' | 'otp' | 'profile' | 'dashboard' | 'upload' | 'pipeline' | 'complete';\n\nconst STEPS = [\n  { id: 'phone', label: 'Phone' }, { id: 'otp', label: 'Verify' }, { id: 'profile', label: 'Profile' },\n  { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard' }, { id: 'upload', label: 'Upload' }, { id: 'pipeline', label: 'Processing' }\n];\n\nconst THEME = { teal: '#004236', gold: '#B8860B', goldLight: '#F5EC9B' };\n\nconst VendorFlow: React.FC<Props> = ({ isOpen, onClose, onComplete, onBack }) => {\n  const [step, setStep] = useState<Step>('phone');\n  const [vendorData, setVendorData] = useState({\n    phone: '', vendorId: '', profile: '', beautifiedProfile: '', companyName: '',\n    catalogFile: null as File | null, products: [] as any[]\n  });\n\n  // Simple voice hook for navigation commands only\n  const voice = useVoice({\n    onCommand: useCallback((cmd: string) => {\n      const c = cmd.toLowerCase();\n      if (c.includes('back') && step !== 'phone') goBack();\n      if (c.includes('close') || c.includes('exit')) onClose();\n    }, [step, onClose]),\n    autoStart: isOpen\n  });\n\n  const goBack = () => {\n    const order: Step[] = ['phone', 'otp', 'profile', 'dashboard', 'upload', 'pipeline'];\n    const idx = order.indexOf(step);\n    if (idx <= 0) { onBack(); return; }\n    setStep(order[idx - 1]);\n    voice.speak(`Going back.`);\n  };\n\n  const goToStep = (newStep: Step) => setStep(newStep);\n\n  const saveProfile = async () => {\n    voice.speak(\"Saving profile...\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:1117/api/vendors', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          phone: vendorData.phone,\n          profile: vendorData.beautifiedProfile || vendorData.profile,\n          companyName: vendorData.companyName\n        })\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      setVendorData(d => ({ ...d, vendorId: data.id }));\n    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }\n    goToStep('dashboard');\n    voice.speak(\"Profile saved! Say upload to continue.\");\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isOpen && step === 'phone') {\n      setTimeout(() => voice.speak(\"Welcome Vendor! Tell me your phone number.\"), 500);\n    }\n  }, [isOpen]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!isOpen) {\n      setStep('phone');\n      setVendorData({ phone: '', vendorId: '', profile: '', beautifiedProfile: '', companyName: '', catalogFile: null, products: [] });\n    }\n  }, [isOpen]);\n\n  if (!isOpen) return null;\n\n  const stepIndex = STEPS.findIndex(s => s.id === step);\n\n  return (\n    <div style={{ position: 'fixed', inset: 0, background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.92)', zIndex: 10000, display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', padding: '20px' }}>\n      <div style={{ background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${THEME.teal}, #001a15)`, borderRadius: '20px', width: '100%', maxWidth: '800px', maxHeight: '90vh', overflow: 'hidden', border: `2px solid ${THEME.gold}40`, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div style={{ padding: '16px 24px', background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', borderBottom: `1px solid ${THEME.gold}30`, display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>\n          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '14px' }}>\n            <span style={{ fontSize: '1.6em' }}>\ud83d\udce6</span>\n            <div>\n              <h2 style={{ color: '#fff', margin: 0, fontSize: '1.1em' }}>Vendor Setup</h2>\n              <span style={{ color: '#888', fontSize: '0.8em' }}>Step {stepIndex + 1} of {STEPS.length}</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={onClose} style={{ background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', border: 'none', color: '#fff', width: '36px', height: '36px', borderRadius: '50%', cursor: 'pointer', fontSize: '1.2em' }}>\u2715</button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Progress */}\n        <div style={{ display: 'flex', padding: '10px 24px', gap: '4px', background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)' }}>\n          {STEPS.map((s, i) => (\n            <div key={s.id} style={{ flex: 1, height: '4px', borderRadius: '2px', background: stepIndex >= i ? THEME.gold : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' }} />\n          ))}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Agent Status */}\n        <div style={{ padding: '12px 24px', background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', borderBottom: `1px solid ${THEME.gold}20` }}>\n          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px' }}>\n            <span style={{ color: THEME.gold, fontWeight: 600 }}>MR. V:</span>\n            <span style={{ color: voice.isListening ? '#4CAF50' : '#888' }}>\n              {voice.isListening ? '\ud83c\udfa4 Listening' : '\u23f8\ufe0f Paused'}\n            </span>\n            <div style={{ marginLeft: 'auto', display: 'flex', gap: '8px' }}>\n              {step !== 'phone' && <button onClick={goBack} style={{ padding: '6px 12px', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', border: 'none', color: '#fff', borderRadius: '15px', cursor: 'pointer', fontSize: '0.85em' }}>\u2190 Back</button>}\n              <button onClick={onClose} style={{ padding: '6px 12px', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', border: 'none', color: '#888', borderRadius: '15px', cursor: 'pointer', fontSize: '0.85em' }}>\u2715 Close</button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <p style={{ margin: '8px 0 0', color: '#ccc' }}>{voice.displayText || 'Ready to assist...'}</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Content */}\n        <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', padding: '24px' }}>\n          {step === 'phone' && (\n            <VendorPhone\n              value={vendorData.phone}\n              onChange={(phone) => setVendorData(d => ({ ...d, phone }))}\n              onNext={() => { goToStep('otp'); voice.speak(`Sending code to ${speakablePhone(vendorData.phone)}.`); }}\n              speak={voice.speak}\n            />\n          )}\n          \n          {step === 'otp' && (\n            <VendorOTP\n              phone={formatPhoneNumber(vendorData.phone)}\n              onVerified={() => { goToStep('profile'); voice.speak(\"Verified! Tell me about your business.\"); }}\n              speak={voice.speak}\n            />\n          )}\n          \n          {step === 'profile' && (\n            <VendorProfile\n              profile={vendorData.profile}\n              beautified={vendorData.beautifiedProfile}\n              companyName={vendorData.companyName}\n              onChange={(p) => setVendorData(d => ({ ...d, profile: p }))}\n              onCompanyChange={(n) => setVendorData(d => ({ ...d, companyName: n }))}\n              onBeautify={(b) => setVendorData(d => ({ ...d, beautifiedProfile: b }))}\n              onSave={saveProfile}\n              speak={voice.speak}\n            />\n          )}\n          \n          {step === 'dashboard' && (\n            <VendorDashboard\n              vendorName={vendorData.companyName || 'Your Store'}\n              onUploadCatalog={() => { goToStep('upload'); voice.speak(\"Upload your catalog.\"); }}\n              speak={voice.speak}\n            />\n          )}\n          \n          {step === 'upload' && (\n            <VendorUpload\n              onFileSelected={(file) => { setVendorData(d => ({ ...d, catalogFile: file })); goToStep('pipeline'); voice.speak(`Processing ${file.name}.`); }}\n              speak={voice.speak}\n            />\n          )}\n          \n          {step === 'pipeline' && (\n            <VendorPipeline\n              file={vendorData.catalogFile || undefined}\n              fileName={vendorData.catalogFile?.name}\n              vendorId={vendorData.vendorId}\n              vendorName={vendorData.companyName}\n              onComplete={(products) => { setVendorData(d => ({ ...d, products })); setStep('complete'); }}\n              speak={voice.speak}\n            />\n          )}\n          \n          {step === 'complete' && (\n            <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: '40px 20px' }}>\n              <div style={{ width: '100px', height: '100px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4CAF50, #2E7D32)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', margin: '0 auto 24px', boxShadow: '0 0 30px rgba(76,175,80,0.4)' }}>\n                <span style={{ fontSize: '3em', color: '#fff' }}>\u2713</span>\n              </div>\n              <h3 style={{ color: THEME.gold, marginBottom: '12px' }}>\ud83c\udf89 You're Live!</h3>\n              <p style={{ color: '#aaa', marginBottom: '32px' }}>{vendorData.products?.length || 0} products published</p>\n              <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '12px', justifyContent: 'center', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>\n                <button onClick={onComplete} style={{ padding: '14px 32px', background: THEME.gold, color: '#000', border: 'none', borderRadius: '25px', cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: 600 }}>\ud83d\udce6 View Products</button>\n                <button onClick={onClose} style={{ padding: '14px 24px', background: 'transparent', color: '#888', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)', borderRadius: '25px', cursor: 'pointer' }}>Done</button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default VendorFlow;\nFLOWEOF\n\necho \"  \u2705 VendorFlow.tsx fixed - Simplified architecture\"\n\n# \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n# CHECKPOINT 3: Clear caches\n# Open http://localhost:5180\"\necho \"    2. Sign In \u2192 Vendor\"\necho \"    3. Say: 'seven zero three three three eight four nine three one'\"\necho \"    4. Should see digits appear in phone field!\"\necho \"\"\necho \"\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\"\n",

      "type": "json_block",
      "json_block": "{\"language\": \"bash\", \"code\": \"#!/bin/bash\\n# \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\n# VISTAVIEW SINGLE FIX SCRIPT\\n# - Does NOT reinstall PostgreSQL (validates it's there)\\n# - Does NOT reinstall MinIO (validates it's there)\\n# - FIXES the voice recognition multiple-instance conflict\\n# - FIXES the beautification engine\\n# - VALIDATES everything before changes\\n# \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\n\\nWORKING_DIR=\\\"/Users/vistaview/vistaview_WORKING\\\"\\n\\necho with: minio server ~/minio-data)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# Check working directory\\nif [ -d \\\"$WORKING_DIR\\\" ]; then\\n    echo \\\"  \\u2705 Working directory: EXISTS\\\"\\nelse\\n    echo \\\"  \\u274c
